title: vandenboschia anceps
intro: Vandenboschia anceps, also known as the New Zealand tangle fern or New Zealand button fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Vandenboschia anceps include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Vandenboschia anceps can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it has also been used in traditional Maori medicine as a poultice or topical treatment.
